ELECTION DAY
NOV
4TUESDAY7-10am, 12-2pm
& 4-7pmST. CLOUD ELEMENTARY SCHOOL PTA
Scan code or use link to SIGN UP
All proceeds go to help fund 5 grade activitiesth
bit.ly/edbakesale25Grab COFFEE, HOT CHOCOLATE & BAKED TREATS 
after you vote at St. Cloud Elementary School!
LOOKING FOR MORE VOLUNTEERS

Join us for our next  PTA  
General Meeting ! 
Wednesday, November 12th
8:00-9:00 PM ET via Zoom
Link to follow via PTA member newsletters and
Wednesday Folder
 
We look forward to seeing you there!

Please JOIN St. Cloud on Friday, Nov. 14th at 9:30am
on Stagg Field. 
The entire school will march to acknowledge and
celebrate Ruby Bridges. Students are ENCOURAGED
to WEAR PURPLE as they walk with their class and
hold signs that are made while learning about Civil
Rights Icon Ruby Bridges. Wear your purple too! 
FRIDAY, NOV 14
9:30am @ Stagg Field

FOOD
DRIVEFOOD
DRIVEST. CLOUD ELEMENTARY SCHOOL PTA
NOVNOVEMBER EMBER 17-21
17-21
We’re collecting shelf-stable food goods to
donate to Foodbank. Send your donations to
school with your child or bring them with you for
your Parent-Teacher conference. 
THE GRADE 
THAT COLLECTS THE 
MOST 
DONATIONS 
WILL WIN 
A PRIZE!

Honor Your Teacher!
Nominate your teacher for the 
$5,000 Honored National Teaching Award
Lift up your teacher and share your story on what makes
them so special! To learn more and nominate your teacher,
scan the QR code below:
honored.org/nominate

NOVEMBER REMINDERS
Grade Level Food Drive
Monday, November 17-21, 2025
 (send with student or bring to parent teacher conference)
Ruby Bridges Day- Join us for the walk
November 14, 2025 at 9:30am
NO School:  November 6, 7, 27, 28
Early Dismissal: November 4, 18, 19,  20, 26
Parent/Teacher Conference: November 18-20
PTA Meeting 
Join us and let your voice be heard  
November 12th 8pm on Zoom
Parent Volunteer Signup for Bookfair 
Be on the lookout to volunteer at the bookfair during your child's class.  E-Wallet
opens so that you can add money to your child's  account. 
   November 10th
